text.title: Hybrid Delivery Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Hybrid Delivery artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: only 1 component (need >=2); component missing risk_profile + evidence; translation_boundaries empty; no governance_cadence.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
